name: Peach Colada
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Peaches; fresh; peeled (more or less, to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender.
2. Blend well until smooth.
3. Makes one drink.
A winning recipe from the recent Peach Dessert Contest at the State Farmers Market in Raleigh, NC.
